raw_consumer_statement: Booked XXXX XXXX XXXX  through XXXX to XXXX XXXX. Reservation was made on XXXX XXXX through citi XXXX  card though citi XXXX  for {$270.00}. The day we reached XXXX airport we were told rental is closed and asked me to come next day at XXXX and they said they don't have any car for me as they were over booked and said they canceled the reservation. I called the citi travel and they promised to refund the money and provide XXXX points as compensation. I paid {$120.00} on XXXX XXXX  and booked different rental through citi card for {$600.00}. I have wasted more than XXXX hours on call with citi and they are not willing to refund {$270.00} as rental did not have any car and all the other costs.
